steps.description: Click the "Type a message..." input box at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface within Google Chrome, targeting the message entry field for user interaction.
Type text: 'hi' into the message input box at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.
Press the Enter key in the text input box at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface after typing "hi".
@assertion there's reply message from test bot.

Type the text "List Contoso history in table" into the input box at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application in Google Chrome and prepare to submit the text using the adjacent send button (right-pointing arrow).
Press Enter in the text input field labeled "List Contoso history in table" at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web interface in Google Chrome.
@assertion there's message tell the contoso history reply from bot.
